title: koelpinia linearis var. latifolia
intro: Koelpinia linearis var. latifolia, also known as Koelreuteria, is a plant species belonging to the family Sapindaceae, native to Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Koelpinia linearis var. latifolia include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
